company_context: Renewable energy company. 75% wind turbine manufacturing, 25% global service and maintenance. Crown jewels: proprietary turbine aerodynamic designs, OT/SCADA networks in blade manufacturing plants, real-time predictive maintenance algorithms, live telemetry data from wind farms.

scenarios.description: Adversary exfiltrates proprietary turbine aerodynamic designs or compromises OT/SCADA networks in blade manufacturing plants, disrupting production and exposing IP.

scenarios.scenario_name: Wind Farm Telemetry and Maintenance Disruption
scenarios.description: Attack on live telemetry systems or remote maintenance scheduling disrupts service delivery and offshore wind farm operations.
Ransomware encrypts corporate IT and OT systems across manufacturing and service divisions, causing operational shutdown and ransom demand.
